source.title: Environmental context-dependent memory: a review and meta-analysis

confidence_rationale: Establishes that cue-context overlap drives retrieval (encoding specificity is real and reliable), but the effect is moderate and the outshining/overshadowing moderators are the load-bearing finding for us: a strong direct cue OUTSHINES contextual overlap. This both supports the cue-system framing and weakens any design that always weights context -- hence mixed. Confidence moderate: robust behavioural meta-analysis but the mapping to an internal goal/context vector is indirect.
failure_signatures: When a salient direct/identity cue is available at test (cued recall), context-overlap retrieval is 'outshone' and the context benefit vanishes or reverses to negligible.
When non-contextual information is emphasised at encoding (overshadowing), the trace is not bound to context and later contextual cues fail to reinstate it.

Mental reinstatement of the original context substitutes for physical context, so physical-context manipulations fail when subjects internally reinstate -- a confound that breaks naive context-overlap predictions.

mapping.source_claim_statement: Incidental environmental context-dependent memory is reliable but moderate in size; it is systematically reduced by overshadowing (strong non-contextual cues at encoding), outshining (strong non-contextual cues at test), and mental reinstatement -- i.e. context-overlap retrieval is a conditional fallback, strongest precisely when a strong direct cue is absent.
mapping.ree_translation: Directly constrains the bank's matching function. SD-039 should preserve more than z_goal in the payload (context features), because biology binds traces to context and retrieves on overlap. But MECH-292's goal_match should be designed so that a strong direct goal-vector match DOMINATES (outshining), with the context channel acting as the weak fallback that matters only when direct match is poor -- not an always-on additive term. ARC-060's discrete bank is the substrate this gating operates over.
mapping.mapping_caveat: This is human verbal-memory behaviour with incidental physical context; 'context' is a room, not an internal world/affect vector. The outshining/overshadowing structure is a strong qualitative design constraint but the quantitative effect sizes do not transfer, and the precise gating curve in an artificial bank is unspecified by the data.
mapping.source_context: Meta-analysis and review of human incidental environmental context-dependent recall/recognition experiments.

confidence_components.notes: Source quality high (cited meta-analysis). Mapping fidelity moderate: the outshining principle is a precise and useful design constraint, but physical-room context is an indirect analogue of an internal context vector. Transfer risk moderate. Exact reported effect size deliberately not quoted -- summarised qualitatively per source-verification flag.
